chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 573 & 583 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 2511/26. 3. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2026 Mr. Ali Tahir, Advocate for the Petitioner in CP No. D- 573/2026. Ms. Samreen Ali Rizvi, Advocate for Petitioner in CP No. D- 583 of 2026. Ms. Anam Sahar, Advocate. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, AAG. DSP Raza Mian, Legal CPO, P.I Saeed Alam, Investigation P.s. Baghdadi, S.I M. Israr khan P.S. Kalaboard, S.I M. Yasin Arain P.S. Kalri and S.I Nadeem Baig P.s. Kharadar. ---------- An Order dated 10.02.2026 issued by the Home Department has been placed before us today by the learned AAG, reflecting that the Detention Orders issued under Section 3 of the Maintenance of Public Order Ordinance (MPO), 1960 during the period from 01.02.2026 to 09.02.2026 have thereby been withdrawn with immediate effect. Under such circumstances, it appears that the Petitions have become infructuous and stand dismissed accordingly. Office to place a copy of this Order in the connected Petition listed above. Judge Judge Ayaz
